textPlain: It seems nice. However is there any way to query arrays within the datastructure itself? Or go deeper in the hierarchy, such as "model.cost"?

I like it! It’s nice offering a little DSL in various spaces. Curious where you’re plugging it in?Any intended support for collections/sets? In JQL is do ‘“foo” not in (“evil”, “silly”)’ or similar matchers over sets, like if tags are on a ticket or if tickets an in an N states
